body: review-spec cycle 1: REQUEST_CHANGES (2 MEDIUM + 3 LOW). Addressed: AC-03 softened rollback wording to match shim parity (per-file atomic, no multi-file rollback promise) + pinned 3+ blank-line collapse (shim line 211); AC-05 expanded with blank-line-padding rule (shim lines 154-159); AC-06 added STYLE.md drift branches (f,g) + idempotency clarified as filesystem byte-equality. Incidental-refs LOW resolves automatically — rg confirms only test-setup-method.sh references the shim. Re-fork cycle 2.

review-spec cycle 2: REQUEST_CHANGES (1 MEDIUM regex lookahead, 1 LOW heuristic convergence). Addressed: AC-03 reframed from pattern-prescribed to behaviour-driven (workspace regex=1.10 is RE2 and rejects lookahead — strip from marker to next top-level heading via line-walk or fixed split, implementer choice). LOW on @-import heuristic convergence left as implementer-handles (identical bytes on typical inputs, no need to over-specify). Re-fork cycle 3.

drive completed: setup-method.sh ported to orbit setup files verb (typed LegacyAction/DriftAction enums, CLI interactive prompts only, MCP typed args), shim+test deleted (244+325 lines), 1 SKILL.md call site rewritten, card 0017 edge written. 0.4.37. PR https://github.com/meridian-online/orbit/pull/35 — review APPROVE, merge=manual (guided autonomy). With this PR all three named candidates in choice 0020 are struck through.
